calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter Bresler appeared via zoom for May Lee (petitioner).

Mr. Bresler stated that his client resides in San Francisco but is in the hospital in Oakland, that she is close to death, and it could be in a matter of weeks. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.
